title: Icon written to disk on every startup — unnecessary I/O
evidence: g_file_set_contents(icon_file.c_str(), reinterpret_cast<const char *>(s_tray_icon_data), s_tray_icon_size, nullptr); — called unconditionally on every app start.
suggestion: Check if the file exists and has the correct size first. Or write a stamp file. Avoids unnecessary disk writes on every launch.

notes.text: Added g_file_test check before writing icon; skips write if file exists
